title: U.S. Senate passes housing bill that carries four-year ban on a Fed CBDC
summary: The idea of a U.S. central bank digital currency — though little more than a research topic at the Federal Reserve — may be getting formally blocked.

title: Securitize and tZERO clash over patents as race to bring Wall Street onchain heats up
summary: tZERO and Securitize are squaring off over tokenization patents as the market attracts more of Wall Street's attention.

title: Ric Edelman says crypto’s biggest growth story is happening off the price chart
summary: Crypto prices remain under pressure, but Ric Edelman says institutional adoption and tokenization are accelerating behind the scenes.

title: 21Shares co-founder warns tokenization hype is outrunning Wall Street reality
summary: Tokenization can improve settlement and asset movement, but key pieces of financial infrastructure remain unprepared for institutional-scale adoption.

title: Strive says digital credit selloff was a liquidation event, not a credit crisis
summary: A sharp selloff in digital credit products exposed growing pains in a young market, a Strive executive argues the underlying credit fundamentals remain intact.
